name: Baby Kay's Shrimp Roumalade
recipeInstructions:
Creole Mustard such as Zatarain's brand can be found in well-stocked supermarkets and gourmet food stores.
1. Mix all ingredients except shrimp together in a bowl.
2. Refrigerate the mixture for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
3. Serve with boiled shrimp on top.
